title: Thermistor coupler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Thermistor couplers''' were items found in the control chamber of the [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] on board the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. [[Tenn Graneet]] noted that they susurrated.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]
